subject: Mozi Minute: Lifestyle Risk vs Business Risk
body:
Words I like: Poor people are impressed by stuff. Rich people are impressed by results.

Here's a meta insight:

You can't take maximum risk in both your lifestyle AND your business at the same time.

You have to pick one.

Elon doesn't have a fancy house. He sleeps at the factory. His lifestyle risk is low. His business risk is maxed.

Sam Walton drove a beat-up truck and lived in a modest home in Arkansas. His lifestyle risk was low. His business risk was maxed.

Most broke people do the opposite. They max out their lifestyle (big house, nice car, expensive habits) and then take zero business risk because they can't afford to fail.

Keep your lifestyle lean.

Maximize your business risk.

That's how you win.
